A Puppet
This isn’t a real boy. It’s a puppet.
A puppet is a doll. You can move parts of its body. You can make a puppet walk and dance. (25) ...... are a lot of different puppets. This puppet has a big, round (26) ...... . It moves from side to side. And look at the puppet’s eyes. Now they are open, but they can (27) ........, too. His arms and legs can move up and down. Look at his pair of shoes! They (28) ......... big and funny.

content:
Read and choose the correct answers.

This is Clarita. She’s a taxi driver. She gets up at half past seven o’clock in the morning.
She doesn’t work in the morning. She goes to work at one o’clock in the afternoon. She drives her taxi around town.
She doesn’t eat dinner at home. She often goes to her grandparents' house and has dinner there. She goes to bed at twelve o’clock.

What does Clarita do?

Tony: So cute!

A. What's this? Đây là gì?

B. What are these? Đây là những cái gì?

C. What's that? Đó là gì?

D. What are those? Đó là những cái gì?

Those are chickens and horses: Đó là những con gà và những con ngựa.

=> Đáp án:

2 - These are ducks and goats.

3 - That is a cow.

4 - Those are chickens and horses
